assembly-file-versioning-format.description: Specifies the format of AssemblyFileVersion and overwrites the value of assembly-file-versioning-scheme.

assembly-file-versioning-scheme.description: The scheme to use when setting AssemblyFileVersion attribute. Can be 'MajorMinorPatchTag', 'MajorMinorPatch', 'MajorMinor', 'Major', 'None'.

assembly-informational-format.description: Specifies the format of AssemblyInformationalVersion. The default value is {InformationalVersion}.

assembly-versioning-format.description: Specifies the format of AssemblyVersion and overwrites the value of assembly-versioning-scheme.

assembly-versioning-scheme.description: The scheme to use when setting AssemblyVersion attribute. Can be 'MajorMinorPatchTag', 'MajorMinorPatch', 'MajorMinor', 'Major', 'None'.

branches.description: The header for all the individual branch configuration.

commit-date-format.description: The format to use when calculating the commit date. Defaults to 'yyyy-MM-dd'.

ignore.description: The header property for the ignore configuration.

major-version-bump-message.description: The regex to match commit messages with to perform a major version increment. Default set to '\+semver:\s?(breaking|major)'

merge-message-formats.description: Custom merge message formats to enable identification of merge messages that do not follow the built-in conventions.

minor-version-bump-message.description: The regex to match commit messages with to perform a minor version increment. Default set to '\+semver:\s?(feature|minor)'

next-version.description: Allows you to bump the next version explicitly. Useful for bumping main or a feature branch with breaking changes

no-bump-message.description: Used to tell GitVersion not to increment when in Mainline development mode. . Default set to '\+semver:\s?(none|skip)'

patch-version-bump-message.description: The regex to match commit messages with to perform a patch version increment. Default set to '\+semver:\s?(fix|patch)'

tag-prefix.description: A regex which is used to trim Git tags before processing. Defaults to [vV]

tag-pre-release-weight.description: The pre-release weight in case of tagged commits. Defaults to 60000.

update-build-number.description: Whether to update the build number in the project file. Defaults to true.

commit-message-incrementing.description: Sets whether it should be possible to increment the version with special syntax in the commit message. Can be 'Disabled', 'Enabled' or 'MergeMessageOnly'.

is-mainline.description: When using Mainline mode, this indicates that this branch is a mainline. By default main and support/* are mainlines.

is-release-branch.description: Indicates this branch config represents a release branch in GitFlow.

is-source-branch-for.description: The branches that this branch is a source branch.

items.description: The branches that this branch is a source branch.

pre-release-weight.description: Provides a way to translate the PreReleaseLabel to a number.

prevent-increment-of-merged-branch-versi.description: Prevent increment of merged branch version.

regex.description: The regex pattern to use to match this branch.

source-branches.description: The source branches for this branch.

items.description: The source branches for this branch.

tag.description: The label to use for this branch. Can be 'useBranchName' to extract the label from the branch name.

tag-number-pattern.description: The regex pattern to use to extract the number from the branch name. Defaults to '[/-](?<number>\d+)[-/]'.

track-merge-target.description: Strategy which will look for tagged merge commits directly off the current branch.

tracks-release-branches.description: Indicates this branch config represents develop in GitFlow.

Nullable`1.description: The increment strategy for this branch. Can be 'Inherit', 'Patch', 'Minor', 'Major', 'None'.

Nullable`11.description: The versioning mode for this branch. Can be 'ContinuousDelivery', 'ContinuousDeployment', 'Mainline'.

Nullable`12.description: Commits before this date will be ignored. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.

array.description: A sequence of SHAs to be excluded from the version calculations.

items.description: A sequence of SHAs to be excluded from the version calculations.
